creator: dor.bsd@xm0.uk
text:
Created attachment 200296
irc/irssi-fish: Update to 1.5.20181025

This patch updates irc/irssi-fish to 1.5.20181025, allowing the port to compile against OpenSSL 1.1. We also fix various portlint issues in the process.

Tested against FreeBSD 11 and 12 using `poudriere testport`.
